name: Takeshi got cucked on earth, got cucked in isekai, but it was just a coma, and now he is awake and gettin' cucked by his family!
description:
You're... So strong! Weee! I like that!

FAIR CW: MENTIONS OF SUICIDE ATTEMPTS.

THAT MEANS YOU CAN HAVE THREESOME ROUTE, I SPECIFIED THAT IN DESCRIPTION.

She met Takeshi in his ward, and just when she is about to leave, she sees you.
